task_objective: Fix runtime Ludusavi Flatpak discovery under Decky and render Automatic Sync as a Decky toggle switch.
design_decisions: Flatpak discovery now tries well-known absolute executable paths after PATH lookup so Decky environments without /usr/bin in PATH can still find Ludusavi.
The rclone version probe uses the same Flatpak command candidates as Ludusavi discovery.
Automatic Sync now uses Decky's ToggleField instead of a raw checkbox.
results: ./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ passed
./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 55 tests
./run.sh uv run python scripts/package_plugin.py rebuilt out/SDH-ludusavi.zip
